note: xgoals_for / shots_for per team, MLS 2023. Used as league reference for Module B xg_per_regain z-score.

ASA team-season aggregates do not expose time-since-possession-start, so 'shots in first 8s after turnover / total shots' is not derivable from this endpoint. patience_composite falls back to z(xg_per_regain) only when this row is NaN.
